items.title: Nations of the World | National Pride Flag Symbol Arms Tee Unisex T-Shirt for Men or Women
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: nations, world, national, pride, flag, symbol, arms, unisex, women. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
